entry.note: <L>9585<pc>1-0718<k1>ASis<k2>ASi/s<h>1 1. {#ASi/s#}¦ (von {#SAs#} mit {#A#}) <lex>f.</lex> nom. {#ASIs#} <ls>P. 6,4,34</ls>, <is>Vārtt</is>. 1. <ls>VOP. 9,36.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">26,69.</ls> <div n="1"> 1) {%Bitte, Bittgebet, Wunsch%} <ls>NAIGH. 3,21.</ls> <ls>NIR. 6,8.</ls> {#sa\tyA de\vezvA\Sizo^ jagAna#} <ls>ṚV. 1,179,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">3,43,2.</ls> {#sa\tyA Ba^vantvA\Sizo^ no\ adya^#} <ls n="ṚV.">7,17,5.</ls> {#mayyA\SIrastu\ mayi^ de\vahU^tiH#} <ls n="ṚV.">10,128,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">8,24,23.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,67,11.</ls> <ls>VS. 2,10.</ls> <ls n="VS.">6,10.</ls> <ls n="VS.">17,57.</ls> <ls n="VS.">19,29.</ls> {#i\daM su me^ SfRuta\ yayA\SizA\ daMpa^tI vA\mama^SnutaH#} <ls>AV. 14,2,9.</ls> <ls n="AV.">4,25,7.</ls> <ls n="AV.">5,24,1.</ls> <ls n="AV. 5,">26,9.</ls> <ls n="AV.">8,9,25.</ls> <ls n="AV. 8,9,">26.</ls> <ls n="AV.">11,8,27.</ls> {#i\ndri\yaM me^ vI\rya^M mA nirva^DI\rityA\Siza^me\vEtAmASA^ste#} <ls>TS. 3,1,8,3.</ls> <ls n="TS.">5,2,2,1.</ls> {#yAmamuyA kAM cASizamASAsizyase sA te sarvA samarDizyata iti#} <ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,8,1,9.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">2,1,4,28.</ls> {#yAM vE kAM ca yajYa ftvija ASizamASAsate yajamAnasyEva sA#} {%jede Bitte, welche die Priester beim Opfer aussprechen, die ist zu Gunsten des Opferers%} (nicht ihrer selbst) <ls n="ŚAT.
